<!--
Fill every section below with real content. Do not delete the headings.
The Definition-of-Ready gate (scripts/check_dor.py) parses this exact structure
and will BLOCK the PR if a section is missing or left as a placeholder.
-->

## Spec / PRD

<!-- Link the PRD, ticket, or spec this change implements. If none exists,
     that is itself a finding: write "NO SPEC EXISTS" explicitly and explain
     why you are proceeding anyway (e.g. hotfix, spike). Do not leave this
     section blank or delete it. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Given/When/Then, or a bullet list of concrete pass/fail conditions.
     "It works" is not an acceptance criterion. -->

## Solution / Design Plan

<!-- One short paragraph: what you changed and why this approach,
     not just what files you touched. -->

## Testing

<!-- What test(s) cover this change? Name the spec file(s).
     If this PR intentionally ships without a test, explain why in one line
     (e.g. "docs only", "config-only, covered by existing X_spec.rb"). -->

- [ ] I ran the full test suite locally and it passes
- [ ] I added/updated a test for this change (or explained above why not)

## Risk / Rollback

<!-- What is the blast radius if this is wrong, and how do we roll it back? -->
